top_signals.title: Stocks Rebound Ahead of Nvidia Earnings; GOP Scores Win in Kentucky | Bloomberg Brief 5/20/2026
top_signals.summary: US equity futures rebound as investors await earnings from Nvidia Client. Ed Gallrein, President Trump's hand-picked candidate for a Kentucky congressional seat, defeats longtime GOP House member Thomas Massie in one of the most expensive primaries on record. Amy Wu Silverman of RBC Capital Markets discusses this earnings season.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Consumer Slowdown Threatens Stocks Rally, UBS Says (Video)
Qivalis expands euro stablecoin consortium to 37 banks
top_signals.summary: Qivalis added 25 European banks to its euro stablecoin consortium, reaching 37 institutions, including Luxembourg's state-owned Spuerkeess.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: PALFINGER to Supply Cranes for North Sea HVDC Platforms
top_signals.summary: PALFINGER has secured a contract to supply davit cranes for five offshore converter platforms in the North Sea, expanding its presence in the offshore wind market as Europe accelerates grid infrastructure development tied to renewable energy…
